title: Minky Anti-Bacterial Cleaing Pad | 3 Pack | Reusable Microfibre Cloth | Minky Pad | Kitchen Cleaner | Dual Sided Sponge | Non Scratch Sponge | Cleaning Products | Cleaning Supplies | Sponges
features: POWERFUL MICROFIBRE - High density microfibre with non-scratch technology is perfect for cleaning kitchen worktops, sinks and appliances. It also buffs and shines stainless steel, chrome and hobs for a showroom finish.
DUAL ACTION - The pad features two different finishes to help you achieve a gleaming showroom finish. The ribbed microfibre backing is ideal for polishing away

SCRATCH FREE - The M Cloth Kitchen pad also features non-scratch technology, allowing you to protect your delicate surfaces such as worktops and appliances without compromising performance – get showroom results every time!
ANTI BACTERIAL - The anti-bacterial formulation prevents the growth of bacteria on the bathroom pad, meaning germs and bacteria are not spread around when cleaning - Hello Hygiene!

SUSTAINABLE SPONGE - The M Cloth Kitchen Pad is made from high quality materials to maintain integrity and ensure it lasts. Unlike other sponges that are thrown away after minimal use, the pad can be washed and re-used ensuring a long lasting life.
description: From the manufacturer Pink Minkeh Grey Minkeh Original Green Minkeh Dual Sided Use wet or dry. Hand wash separately in warm soapy water to keep pad clean and fresh. Re-shape whilst damp and allow to air dry. Each pad is individually sewn by machinists, therefore size and shape may vary slightly. There may also be occasional thread ends, these can simply be cut off if required with no damage to the pad. 80% Polyester 20% Polyamide Inner - Polyurethane sponge M Cloth Anti Bacterial Cleaning Pad Three Vibrant Colours The M Cloth Anti Bacterial Cleaning Pad is dual sided for effective powerful scrubbing, making light work of all cleaning and washing up tasks. The scrubbing side is ideal for quickly removing burnt on stains and marks, while the microfibre side simply lifts away grease and grime. Each pad is treated with a long-lasting, anti bacterial protection preventing the growth of bacteria. The famous 'Minkeh' also comes in three vibrant colours to suit your every cleaning mood. Saves Money - No need to purchase expensive chemicals Saves Time - Perfect results every time Outstanding Performance - Extra cleaning power with anti bacterial protection No need for chemicals Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are one of the world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as a supplier of high quality products to the Royal Household and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product quality and a commitment to the environment.
